title: 10 best herbal capsules for numbness in hands
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for numbness in hands are a natural remedy designed to alleviate tingling, burning, or prickling sensations in fingers and palms. These capsules contain a blend of herbs such as capsaicin, ginger, and turmeric that help improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation, thus alleviating numbness. For example, products like Capsaicin Cream Capsules and Herbal Numbness Relief Formula have shown to provide relief from hand numbness. By taking these capsules, individuals can experience improved dexterity, reduced discomfort during daily activities, and enhanced overall quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with numbness in hands because of its unique blend of nutrients and antioxidants that promote healthy blood circulation. The capsules contain compounds that help to improve nerve function, reducing numbness and tingling sensations in the hands. Additionally, they are rich in omega-3 fatty acids and other essential fatty acids that nourish the skin and underlying tissues, allowing for greater sensitivity and sensation.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Maidenhair tree capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation and swelling in the nerves, which can contribute to numbness or tingling sensations in the hands.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in maidenhair tree capsules help protect the nerves from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can also contribute to numbness and tingling sensations.

Neuroprotective properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain neuroprotective compounds that may help protect the nerve cells from damage and degeneration, potentially relieving numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
remedy_parts: Roots: Contains bioactive compounds that help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations by stimulating blood circulation and reducing inflammation.
Barks: Rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in relieving numbness and pain in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the ground ginkgo biloba powder with 50 milliliters of distilled water in a saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 20 minutes, allowing the herbs to steep and infuse their active compounds into the water.
Strain the infusion through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container, discarding the solids and retaining the liquid extract.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the ginkgo biloba liquid extract at a dosage of 250 milligrams per capsule and seal for later use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Brahmi capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain a concentrated extract of Bacopa monnieri, an herb traditionally used to enhance cognitive function and improve memory. The active compounds in brahmi capsules have been shown to increase the production of neurotransmitters that stimulate nerve endings, reducing numbness and tingling sensations in the hands. Additionally, brahmi's antioxidant properties help protect nerves from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy nerve function and alleviating numbness and prickling sensations in the hands.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Brahmi capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce inflammation in the nerves, which can cause numbness in the hands, and alleviate associated pain.

Neuroprotective property: Brahmi's neuroprotective compounds help protect the nerve cells from damage and degeneration, which can contribute to numbness and tingling sensations in the hands, thereby promoting healthy nerve function.

Antioxidant property: Brahmi capsules contain antioxidants that neutralize free radicals and prevent oxidative stress, which can damage nerves and cause numbness, helping to maintain overall nerve health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, Brahmi roots are used to alleviate numbness in hands due to their ability to improve circulation and reduce inflammation.
Rhyzomes: With a high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, Brahmi rhyzomes help to increase blood flow to the hands, reducing numbness and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried bacopa monnieri leaves from a trusted source weighing exactly 100 grams.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle taking 10 minutes.
Combine 50 grams of the powdered bacopa monnieri with 50 grams of potato starch and 10 grams of gelatin mixing well for 5 minutes.
Fill empty capsule shells with the mixture weighing approximately 500 milligrams per capsule using a spoon taking 15 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature away from direct sunlight for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with numbness in hands because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The active compound curcumin, present in turmeric, has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that can cause numbness or tingling sensations in the hands. By reducing swelling and repairing damaged tissue, turmeric capsules help restore normal nerve function, alleviating symptoms of numbness, tingling, and pain. This natural remedy provides a safe and effective way to address hand numbness, promoting overall well-being and quality of life.
remedy_properties: Curcumin's anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, has potent anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the nerves, which may be contributing to numbness in the hands.
Curcumin's antioxidant properties: Curcumin's antioxidant properties can help protect the nerves from oxidative damage and inflammation, which may be causing numbness in the hands.

Curcumin's neuroprotective effects: Turmeric's curcumin has been shown to have neuroprotective effects, which means it can help promote nerve health and function, potentially alleviating symptoms of numbness in the hands.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzome is the thick, underground stem of the turmeric plant, which contains a high concentration of curcuminoids that help alleviate numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.

Roots: The roots of the turmeric plant are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce numbness and discomfort in the hands by promoting blood flow and reducing inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest curcuma longa roots extract 2-3 grams of fresh or dried root material from the curcuma longa plant.
Dry the root material grind the root material into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the curcuma longa powder with excipients prepare a mixture containing 250 milligrams of curcuma longa powder per capsule with excipients like lactose or starch.
Fill the capsules encapsulate the curcuma longa powder mixture into vegetarian capsules using an automatic capsule filler machine.
Package and store label the capsules in glass jars with tight-fitting lids and store them in a cool dry place for up to 6 months.

remedy_recipe: Harvest and clean hypericum perforatum dried leaves and stems weighing approximately one hundred grams.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator or sun drying for eight hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for ten minutes.
Mix the ground plant material with 500 milligrams of gelatin powder in a small bowl for five minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency for thirty minutes.

remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality withania somnifera roots weighing 500 grams for proper dosage requirements.
Clean and cut the roots into small pieces then dry them using shade drying or air circulation method for two weeks.
Grind the dried root pieces into fine powder using a mortar and pestle taking approximately 30 minutes to complete.
Mix one part of the powder with three parts of pure gelatin capsule filler powder adding 10% glycerin as lubricant in a ratio of 1:100.
Fill the mixture into empty vegetable capsules using an encapsulating machine setting it to fill 500 capsules within 15 minutes.

Measure out 100 grams of the herb and chop it into small pieces.
Mix the chopped herb with 500 milliliters of distilled water for 4 hours.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve to collect the extract.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain a natural ingredient that has a sedative effect on the nervous system, which can help to reduce numbness and tingling sensations. remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried valeriana officinalis roots at a ratio of one part root to two parts leaf and chop them into small pieces.
Combine the chopped herbs with 60% ethanol for four hours and then filter out the solvent using cheesecloth and collect the extract.
Mix the extract with gelatin and water at a concentration of 500mg per capsule and fill 50-count capsules with the mixture.
Dehydrate the filled capsules in a low-temperature oven set at 150 degrees fahrenheit for two hours to harden the shells.
Store the finished capsules in an airtight container away from direct sunlight and moisture at room temperature for up to six months.

Mix the ground ginseng powder with 200ml of boiling water to create a decoction and steep for 30 minutes.
Filter the decoction through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a bowl and let it cool completely taking 1 hour.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the cooled ginseng decoction mixture and seal tightly using a capsule filler machine.

Mix the powdered herbal extract with a binder such as silica gel in a ratio of 1:2 to improve capsule filling efficiency, followed by gentle blending for 5 minutes.

remedy_recipe: Gather dried passionflower flowers and herbs from a reputable supplier or harvest yourself according to local regulations.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried achillea millefolium leaves and flowers, measuring out 2 cups for this recipe.

Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 30 minutes, allowing the herbs to steep and release their active compounds.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto capsules helps with numbness in hands because they promote healthy circulation and reduce inflammation. As a result, many individuals have reported relief from hand numbness and improved overall mobility after taking saw palmetto supplements regularly.

Antioxidant properties: Saw palmetto's antioxidants help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, which can damage nerves and contribute to numbness, tingling, and other symptoms associated with conditions like carpal tunnel syndrome.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried serenoa repens root powder.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh verbascum thapsus leaves and flowers, ensuring at least 2 ounces of plant material.
Dry the plant material in a warm and dry place for 7-10 days, or until brittle and crumbly.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or food processor.
Mix 250 milligrams of powdered verbascum thapsus with 500 milligrams of gelatin in 1 tablespoon of water, stirring for 10 minutes.
Fill capsules with the mixture and store them in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months, allowing 30 days between each capsule preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with numbness in hands because they promote blood circulation and improve liver function. The antioxidants present in dandelion root extract help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to nerve damage and numbness. Additionally, the capsules contain compounds that support the body's natural detoxification processes, helping to remove toxins that may be causing or exacerbating numbness in the hands. By addressing these underlying issues, dandelion capsules provide a natural solution for alleviating numbness and promoting overall hand health.
remedy_properties: Vasodilatory effects: Dandelion's active compounds, such as taraxasterol and triterpenoids, have been shown to relax blood vessels and improve blood circulation, which helps to reduce numbness in the hands by increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to affected areas.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Dandelion contains flavonoids and sesquiterpenes that have potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that may contribute to numbness or tingling sensations in the hands.

Antioxidant activity: Dandelion's antioxidant compounds, such as vitamin C and beta-carotene, help protect against damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate numbness or weakness in the hands.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, dandelion roots have been traditionally used to relieve numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
Rhyzomes: The underground stem-like structure of dandelion plants contains anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce numbness and improve circulation in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh dandelion roots extract taraxacum officinale by washing them gently with water and removing any debris.
Dry the extracted roots using a food dehydrator at 150°f for 24 hours to preserve their medicinal properties.
Grind 20 grams of dried dandelion root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle to create a uniform consistency.
Mix the powdered dandelion root with 10 milliliters of glycerin and 50 milliliters of water to create a smooth paste preparation time is 30 minutes.
Fill empty #00 gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the prepared dandelion root paste and store in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover capsules helps with numbness in hands because they contain isoflavones, which have been shown to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation. The capsules help to dilate blood vessels, increasing circulation and oxygenation of the extremities, including the hands. This increased blood flow helps to combat numbness caused by poor circulation, allowing for improved nerve function and sensation in the fingers and hands. As a result, individuals may experience relief from numbness and tingling sensations.
remedy_properties: Isoflavones: Red clover capsules contain isoflavones, which have been shown to improve blood flow and reduce inflammation, helping to relieve numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
Saponins: The saponin content in red clover capsules has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling and discomfort in the hands, contributing to reduced numbness and tingling.

Phytoestrogens: Phytoestrogens are plant-based compounds found in red clover that mimic the effects of estrogen in the body. They have been shown to improve blood flow and reduce symptoms of menopause-related numbness and tingling in the hands.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of red clover contain isoflavones, which have been shown to improve circulation and reduce numbness and tingling sensations in the hands.
Seeds: Red clover seeds are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an omega-6 fatty acid that helps to reduce inflammation and alleviate numbness and pain in the hands.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of dried red clover flowers trifolium pratense and grind them into a fine powder.
Combine the ground red clover powder with 10 grams of silica gel as an anti-caking agent.
Mix 500 mg of the combined herbal blend with 250 mg of organic rice flour to fill capsules.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the herbal mixture and store in an airtight container for up to six months.
Consume three capsules twice daily after meals for 30 days to alleviate numbness in hands.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat numbness in hands with herbal capsules is by taking a combination of Ashwagandha, Ginkgo Biloba, and St. John's Wort. These herbs help improve blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and stimulate nerve regeneration. Additionally, Omega-3 fatty acid-rich capsules from flaxseed or fish oil can also be taken to reduce inflammation and promote healthy nerve function. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new supplements.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to numbness in hands that are treated with herbal capsules are carpal tunnel syndrome, Raynaud's disease, and peripheral neuropathy. These conditions cause tingling, weakness, or loss of sensation in the fingers and hands. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like Ashwagandha, Ginkgo Biloba, and Turmeric have anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate symptoms by improving blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and soothing nerve damage.
